devicesTabs.overviewDescription: How this computer is set up to work with your AI staff.
devicesTabs.browserDescription: Install and pick the browser your agents should drive.
devicesTabs.permissionsDescription: Choose who can use this computer, and how they need to be approved.
devicesTabs.myDevicesDescription: Every computer you've linked to your account.
devicesTabs.auditDescription: A record of every time an agent used one of your devices.
devicesTabs.placeholder: Coming soon. We're still building this.

myDevicesHelpIntro: These are the computers you've authorized for AI staff. Once enabled, an agent can run real commands, access files, open apps, and browse the web on that machine — not just chat.
myDevicesHelpAccess: This computer belongs to you, not to any workspace — switching workspaces won't touch these settings. By default only your Personal Staff can use it, and your Personal Staff only talks to you — nobody else. Any other agent needs your hands-on approval.

audit.recentDescription: Everything an agent has done — or asked to do — on this computer.

approval.title: How approval works
approval.description: When an agent asks to use this computer, where can you approve from?

anyDevice.label: Any signed-in device
anyDevice.description: Confirm from your phone, another computer, or the web — wherever you're already signed in.

thisDevice.label: Only this computer
thisDevice.description: Stricter: confirmation must happen here, at this machine.

policy.title: Default for new agents
policy.description: What happens the first time an agent you haven't configured asks to do something.

always.label: Always allow
always.description: Approve once and don't ask again.

once.label: Allow just this time
once.description: Approved only for the current task; asks again next time.

perCommand.label: Ask for every action
perCommand.description: Check in with you before each command. Very chatty, very safe.

onlyWhenAsked.label: Only when I ask
onlyWhenAsked.description: Agents can't act on their own — they need you to start the task.

agents.title: Authorized agents
agents.description: Agents and workspaces you've given access to this computer. You can tighten the rules per entry.

browser.runtimeDescription: The library agents use to actually drive a browser — click, type, read the page. We use Playwright under the hood.
browser.runtimeSubtitle: Needed for agents to open and control web pages
browser.binaryDescription: Pick the browser agents will open by default. The bundled one is safest — it's isolated from your day-to-day browser.

agentVisibility.tooltip: When off, agents won't see the browser skill. The installed Playwright runtime is preserved.
agentVisibility.outOfSync: Daemon hasn't picked up this setting yet
agentVisibility.outOfSyncTooltip: Try toggling off and on, or restart the app

reloadStatus.shutdownTimeout: Daemon shutdown timed out (5s); reload may have left things in a bad state
reloadStatus.spawnFailedRolledBack: New daemon failed to start; rolled back to previous config
reloadStatus.spawnFailedNoRollback: Daemon respawn failed and rollback also failed; daemon is offline. Restart app.

help.permission_denied: The installer needs permissions. Run the command below in your terminal and retry.
help.network: Network unreachable. Check your connection; corporate networks may need a proxy.
help.no_system_browser: No Chrome or Edge detected. Install one and retry.
help.node_missing: Node.js isn't installed. Finish the Node.js step before Playwright.
help.version_mismatch: Version mismatch. Click "Retry with --force" to reinstall.
help.unknown: Unclassified failure. Check the logs for details.
help.networkHint: You can inspect npm proxy settings: npm config get proxy
help.nodeMissingHint: Use "Retry with --force" to reinstall starting from the Node.js step.

errors.operationInProgress: Another browser operation is running. Please wait for it to finish.
errors.browserNotInstalled: Finish installing the browser runtime before enabling agent access.
errors.runtimeNotStarted: The ahand runtime isn't running yet. Please try again shortly.
errors.unavailableInWeb: This setting is only available in the desktop app.

overview.masterSwitchDescription: Turn this off and no agent can use this computer — even ones you approved before.
overview.systemPermsDescription: macOS needs to grant a few permissions before agents can fully use this machine.

screenRecording.label: Screen Recording
screenRecording.description: Let agents see what's on your screen.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Let agents click, type, and move windows for you.

automation.label: Automation
automation.description: Let agents run commands and control other apps.

fullDiskAccess.label: Full Disk Access
fullDiskAccess.description: Let agents read and write files anywhere on this Mac.

confirmRemoveThisMac: Remove this device? The daemon will disconnect and your ahand identity will be cleared.
confirmRemove: Remove {{name}}? That device will lose its connection.

error.hubUnavailable: Remote service unavailable. Please try again.
error.deviceRevoked: aHand: this device is no longer authorized. Please re-enable.

ctaTitle: Let an agent actually use your computer
ctaBody: Want an agent to really drive your computer and browser — not just chat? Grab our desktop app and pair this machine in seconds.
noAppInstalledHint: If nothing happened, the desktop app may not be installed yet.
